description: A polished, agency-designed promotional graphic urging unlawfully present immigrants to use the CBP Home App to self-deport. The composition is split diagonally with the DHS/CBP color palette of navy blue, bright cerulean blue, white, and red. The upper-left shows a smartphone mockup displaying the 'Welcome To CBP Home' app screen, labeled 'Official App of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security' with a small U.S. flag, the DHS seal, descriptive text 'A single portal to multiple CBP services to streamline your experience,' and a red 'LOGIN OR SIGN UP' button with a 'with LOGIN.GOV' note. A speech-bubble shape points from the phone to white headline text on a navy field reading: 'Use the CBP Home app to begin planning your departure and transition back to your home country or another location where you have legal status.' The circular U.S. Customs and Border Protection / DHS seal sits at center. The lower half shows a second smartphone (in a white-gloved hand) displaying app navigation options, beside a red-tinted photograph of a line of people being escorted/walking away across tarmac flanked by an armed officer wearing 'POLICE'. Large bold white block text reads 'PLAN YOUR DEPARTURE.' The propaganda technique pairs a friendly, helpful 'app convenience' framing with an implicit threat of forced removal (the red-tinted enforcement photo), nudging undocumented people toward 'voluntary' departure. Target audience: immigrants without legal status, pressured to leave on their own.
notable_text: Use the CBP Home app to begin planning your departure and transition back to your home country or another location where you have legal status. / PLAN YOUR DEPARTURE / Welcome To CBP Home / LOGIN OR SIGN UP
